wins: New credit card products drove higher consumer spend at an industry-leading rate
CIB revenue grew 26% year-over-year with increased market share
Mobile app enhancements added 1.6 million active customers
Exceeded $150 million commitment to advance racial equity in home ownership
Launched co-branded credit cards with Choice Hotels
risks: Net loan charge-offs increased across commercial real estate and credit card portfolios
